channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 23.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour says Reform UK ‘in chaos’ as Zia Yusuf publicly tells Jenrick he’s got party’s deportation policy wrong – UK politics live
item.description: Labour says Reform UK ‘in chaos’ as Zia Yusuf publicly tells Jenrick he’s got party’s deportation policy wrong – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer says ‘questions need to be answered’ over Murrell embezzlement as SNP urged to launch inquiry
item.description: Starmer says ‘questions need to be answered’ over Murrell embezzlement as SNP urged to launch inquiry

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Greens to run scaled-back campaign in Makerfield byelection in potential boost for Burnham
item.description: Greens to run scaled-back campaign in Makerfield byelection in potential boost for Burnham

item.title: The Guardian: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman - The Guardian
item.description: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: on one level quite funny there are so few Labour MSPs that they’ve *all* been given a shadow ministerial role of some kind; on another, continues to be a red flag that this guy has had no accountability for the odd ci...
item.description: on one level quite funny there are so few Labour MSPs that they’ve *all* been given a shadow ministerial role of some kind; on another, continues to be a red flag that this guy has had no accountability for the odd ci...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Carol Vorderman demands apology from Reform candidate over ‘disgusting comments’
item.description: Carol Vorderman demands apology from Reform candidate over ‘disgusting comments’

item.title: Novara Media: Malaysia Set to Take Israel to ICJ Over Torture of Flotilla Activists
item.description: Malaysia Set to Take Israel to ICJ Over Torture of Flotilla Activists

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman
item.description: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman

item.title: BBC Politics: Sentences of boys spared custody over rape referred to Court of Appeal
item.description: Sentences of boys spared custody over rape referred to Court of Appeal

item.title: ITVX: Starmer tasks government with taking 'game-changer' social media action - ITVX
item.description: Starmer tasks government with taking 'game-changer' social media action - ITVX
